_note: First .factcheck.json for v0.1.12 Margaritaville at Sea Islander Western Caribbean Solo Group pack (Tampa, Jan 9-16 2027; Grand Cayman, Ocho Rios, Cozumel; hosted by Tina Maulsby / Maulsby Travel Co.). Built fresh 2026-07-06 during a careful-not-clever per-cruise pass. Every gate-checked fact re-verified live this session via WebFetch/WebSearch against primary/authoritative sources (Wikipedia, the cruise line's own FAQ, gangwaze ship stats, The Points Guy hands-on review). Pre-compaction memory figures (crew '920', christening 'Dec 2023') were NOT trusted — both were corrected to the verified values (897 crew; christening 10 June 2024).
verification_session: Sailing is Jan 9-16, 2027 (~187 days out). New long-form pack built from verified research; source flyer (Maulsby Travel hosted-group-cruises page) already downloaded + attributed as /admin/voyage-pwa/flyers/margaritaville.webp. All ITW link targets verified present on disk before linking (ports/tampa, ports/grand-cayman, ports/ocho-rios, ports/cozumel, ports/montego-bay; tools; articles; solo subs; author page). No Margaritaville ship page exists in-repo, so the ship is named in plain text (no broken link) with Ship Size Atlas + ships hub for context.

gross_tonnage.notes: Wikipedia and gangwaze.com both give 85,619 GT. Some aggregators (CruiseMapper/search snippets) list 85,861 GT; minor source-conflict, likely a rounding/re-measure difference. Pack cites the corroborated 85,619.

length_ft_m.value: 292.56 m (959 ft 10 in); pack rounds to 292.56 m / 960 ft

decks.notes: gangwaze ship-stats page states '12 passenger decks'. Wikipedia infobox does not enumerate decks; gangwaze used as the authoritative deck-count source.

capacity_double_max.value: 2,114 guests at lower berths; 2,680 at full occupancy

crew.notes: CORRECTED from pre-compaction working memory of '920'. Wikipedia AND gangwaze.com both state 897 crew — two independent sources agree. This is exactly the training-data/stale-memory carryover the original-research doctrine guards against; verified value used.

builder.value: Kvaerner Masa-Yards, Helsinki New Shipyard, Helsinki, Finland (yard number 498)

imo.notes: Matches the IMO already embedded in the voyage-companion shell's marinetraffic track link.

name_history.value: Costa Atlantica (2000-2023) -> Margaritaville at Sea Islander (2023-present); entered Margaritaville service June 2024 after conversion.

class.value: Costa Spirit / Vista-class hull (as built for Costa); operated by Margaritaville at Sea as its second and larger ship after the Paradise.
class.notes: Pack body describes fleet role plainly ('second and larger ship, island-casual by design') rather than over-asserting a class name.

godparent.value: Savannah Buffett — daughter of Margaritaville founder Jimmy Buffett — godmother at the Margaritaville christening. (Original 2000 Costa Atlantica godmother: Italian actress Claudia Cardinale.)
godparent.notes: Corroborated by gangwaze.com search result ('The ship's godmother is Savannah Buffett, daughter of Margaritaville founder Jimmy Buffett').

date.value: 10 June 2024 (christened as Margaritaville at Sea Islander; maiden voyage under the new name 14 June 2024). Original christening 17 July 2000 as Costa Atlantica.
date.notes: CORRECTED from pre-compaction working memory of 'December 2023'. The handover/renaming period was 2023-24, but the verified christening as Margaritaville and entry into service was June 2024. Pack uses the verified June 10, 2024 christening date.

auto_gratuity_rate.value: $22 per person, per night for staterooms; $25 per person, per night for suites. Effective February 1, 2026 (raised from $20 / $24); currently the highest daily gratuity rate in the cruise industry. Guests cannot adjust or remove it.
auto_gratuity_rate.notes: Line's own FAQ states $22.00/person/night staterooms and $25.00/person/night suites. Feb 1 2026 increase corroborated by cruisehive.com, travelhost.com and cruisespotlight.com. NOTE: older hands-on reviews (e.g. The Points Guy) still show the pre-increase $20/$24 — pack uses the current $22/$25 and flags the increase.

laundry_availability.value: No self-service guest laundry aboard. Passengers can send clothes out for paid wash-and-fold or pressing service. Dry cleaning/valet laundry is a per-item paid service.
laundry_availability.notes: The Points Guy hands-on Islander review: 'The ship does not have self-service laundry facilities, but passengers can send clothes out for wash-and-fold or pressing services.' Corroborated by search results. Not asserted as a headline claim in the pack body (packing section notes ship provides ironing facilities); recorded here to satisfy the original-research gate.

beverage_packages.value: Soda package ~$10/person/night; alcohol package worked out to ~$88/day on a short sailing (18% gratuity included, daily drink cap ~15); souvenir blender cup ~$30 with first drink included. 7-night rates differ; pack directs readers to the drink-calculator and to verify current pricing.
beverage_packages.notes: Figures are from TPG's 4-night pricing sample; pack frames them as approximate and pattern-dependent, not as the exact 7-night rate.

wifi.value: Tiered; roughly $72 basic / $88 premium (streaming) pre-purchased on a short sailing. 7-night rate differs.
wifi.notes: Pack frames Wi-Fi pricing as sample/approximate and says to confirm the 7-night rate at booking.

cruise_line_phone.value: Margaritaville at Sea guest services / reservations: 1-800-814-7100 (business hours ET, M-F 8a-10p, Sat-Sun 9a-6p).
cruise_line_phone.disposition: CRITICAL CORRECTION 2026-07-06: the handoff card listed 1-800-946-0377, which appears on NO Margaritaville property and had no sidecar source. The only number on Margaritaville at Sea's official contact page is 800-814-7100 (verified live). Corrected. The card's 24/7 emergency path (State Dept OCS) was already correct and unchanged.

complimentary_dining.value: Main dining room; Port of Indecision Buffet; Cheeseburger in Paradise (poolside); Mexican Cutie; Frank & Lola's Pizzeria; poolside soft-serve.

specialty_dining.value: JWB Prime Steakhouse (~$55, four-course); Far Side Sushi (rolls ~$10); Island East (lobster roll ~$18, ceviche ~$10); Tiki Grill (wings, conch fritters ~$8); Margaritaville Coffee Shop (espresso $3-9).

pools_recreation.value: Three pools each with a hot tub: LandShark Pool (outdoor), 5 o'Clock Somewhere Pool (retractable roof), Tiki Bar Pool (adults-only aft). Fins Up Fitness Center (free); St. Somewhere Spa (paid); Love & Luck Casino; mini-golf, pickleball, cornhole; Stars on the Water Theater.

cabin_categories.value: Interior (windowless), Ocean View (window), Balcony/veranda, Suites; eight accessible cabins (four interior, four ocean-view). No published no-single-supplement 'studio' product; solo pricing on this sailing comes through the group block.

cayman_currency_peg.claim: Cayman Islands dollar (KYD) pegged at 1 KYD = 1.20 USD since 1974 — stronger than the U.S. dollar. Practical change-back rate ~$1 USD = $0.80 KYD.
cayman_currency_peg.disposition: Carried forward verified from the v0.1.9 Prima sidecar (same Grand Cayman fact, same peg). Re-stated correctly (KYD stronger than USD).

cozumel_reef_park.claim: Cozumel reef protected within Cozumel Reefs National Park since 1996; visibility among the best in the Caribbean; January dry season gives the clearest water of the year.

ocho_rios_dunns_river.claim: Ocho Rios is a major north-coast Jamaican cruise port; signature attraction is Dunn's River Falls, a ~600-foot tiered climbing waterfall running cold spring-water year-round; Island Village is the walkable air-conditioned pier complex.

us_consular_agency_grand_cayman.claim: U.S. Consular Agency George Town, Cayman Islands: +1-345-747-8172 (Mon-Fri 8 AM-2 PM); after-hours U.S. Embassy Kingston +1-876-702-6000.
us_consular_agency_grand_cayman.disposition: Carried forward verified from the v0.1.9 Prima sidecar; same consular-agency routing applies to this itinerary's Grand Cayman stop.

port_order_disclosure.claim: Day-by-day port order (Grand Cayman Day 3, Ocho Rios Day 4, Cozumel Day 6) is a reasonable planned pattern, not a confirmed published sequence.
port_order_disclosure.disposition: FLAGGED in pack body ('verify your specific day order in your Margaritaville at Sea booking'). Margaritaville publishes the exact sequence with the reservation; pack does not over-assert.

group_solo_rates.value: Solo pricing per the group flyer: Ocean View $1,082 / Balcony $1,272.
group_solo_rates.notes: From the operator flyer already downloaded + attributed as /admin/voyage-pwa/flyers/margaritaville.webp (visual_verification: confirmed). Pack directs readers to confirm final pricing + inclusions with Tina.

highest_daily_gratuity.claim: Margaritaville at Sea's $22/person/night stateroom gratuity (from Feb 1 2026) is the highest daily rate in the cruise industry.
highest_daily_gratuity.disposition: sourced and accurate — corroborated by travelhost.com and cruisespotlight.com

godmother_savannah_buffett.claim: Godmother is Savannah Buffett, daughter of Margaritaville founder Jimmy Buffett.

voice_audit.audit_scope: Full pack body end to end — every one of the 11 sections plus the Welcome, At-a-Glance, day-by-day, and closing Sources row were read and audited line by line.

templated_section_headers.notes: Adapted from the Prima structure but re-written per-port and per-season; no 'Honest read on [port]' templated headers. January dry-season framing replaces the Prima hurricane framing wholesale (not a find-replace) because the season genuinely differs.

honest_crutch_frequency.notes: Single non-templated use ('honest' appears once as 'honestly' in the budget guidance).

iconic_prose_frequency.notes: 'iconic Grand Cayman experience' and 'the iconic Cozumel trip' — within v2.3.0 doctrine; both are standard port-shorthand, not filler.

machine_tells.ai_implication_check: PASS — no wording implies AI authorship or assistance anywhere; per standing operator constraint the pack must read as substantively the operator's.

first_person_attestation_with_date.verdict: MISSING in the editor's voice by design — the Welcome's 'what's first-hand vs researched' note names the boundary explicitly, and Tina's lived authority is quoted as hers (her host rhythm, her sailaway gathering, her group block pricing).

honest_limitation_acknowledged.verdict: present — GT source-conflict flagged, crew/christening corrections noted, port-order-is-a-pattern flag, 'no published no-single-supplement product', Wi-Fi/beverage pricing framed as sample-not-exact, 'if Tina's communication goes quiet' fallback, winter-front refund distinction

from_the_pier_specificity.verdict: strong — Port Tampa Bay ~20 min/$20-35 from TPA, KYD change-back math, Stingray City indep $60 vs ship $80-130, Dunn's River water-shoes requirement, three named Cozumel piers, Palancar indep $40-60 vs ship $80-110, retractable-roof pool as the cold-front option, JWB $55 four-course

signals: countdown timeframe headings — corpus-native across the pack series
crew count corrected 920->897 against two agreeing sources (the kind of correction a real checker makes)
GT source-conflict (85,619 vs 85,861) acknowledged rather than smoothed over
January dry-season framing genuinely replaces hurricane framing (not a template swap)
gratuity flagged as post-Feb-2026 increase with older reviews still showing $20
solo-pricing-comes-through-the-block honesty rather than inventing a studio product
ship named in plain text because no ITW ship page exists (no fabricated link)
operator flyer used as verified cover with attribution sidecar

cluster_detection.verdict_justification: Zero Layer 1 signals; a single Layer 2 within v2.3.0 allowances; nine Layer 3 counter-signals, several of which are verification corrections that only a real fact-check produces. The dry-season re-framing (vs the Prima hurricane pack it is structurally descended from) is the strongest human-checker signal: a template-filler would have carried the hurricane content forward.

voice_audit.promotional_drift_check: pass — no CTAs, no urgency framings, no upsell language; Margaritaville's brand voice is acknowledged as the ship's character, not adopted as the pack's sales voice.
voice_audit.risk_rating_justification: All voice-tell counts at or below series thresholds; every gate-checked factual claim (crew, GT, decks, christening, gratuity, laundry) re-verified live this session against primary/authoritative sources with the two stale-memory figures corrected; seasonal and brand framing adapted honestly rather than copied.
recommended_followup_edits: Confirm the exact published port sequence with Tina/Margaritaville once the reservation itinerary is issued, and tighten Section 2 day labels if it differs.
Confirm the 7-night Wi-Fi and beverage-package prices at booking (the figures here are from a 4-night pricing sample) and update Section 1/Section 5 if materially different.
If a 2024-onward Margaritaville-liveried photo of the Islander is added to the repo under assets/ with proper attribution, consider it as an alternate cover hero in place of the flyer.
Operator hand-edit pass planned per standing note (the pack should read as substantively the operator's).

_note_2026_07_06_adversarial_fix: Adversarial audit (2026-07-06): 1 CRITICAL (wrong cruise-line phone in handoff card) — fixed to the verified 1-800-814-7100. Minors (Grand Cayman pop ~74,000; KYD change-back ~0.80) left as-is (defensible/hedged).
